Workset name (from Revit worksharing)
Phase created name (element birth phase)
Phase demolished name (element demolition phase)
Design option set and option name
Assembly/Uniformat classification code from family type
Assembly code description text
Element bounding box volume (m3)
Element elevation from project base point (m)
Host element type and ID (for hosted families)
Connected/joined element summary (count and types)
Analytical model status and type
Structural usage (beam, column, brace, other)
Structural material grade (C30/37, S355, etc.)
Connected MEP system name(s)
MEP system abbreviation code
Number of active connectors on element
Upstream connected element (supply source)
Downstream connected element (served element)

Material recyclability percentage

Replacement cost (UGX) for lifecycle analysis
Applicable building code clause reference
Accessibility compliance status (COMPLIANT/NON-COMPLIANT/N-A)
Environmental certification reference (EDGE/LEED/BREEAM)
Maintenance frequency (DAILY/WEEKLY/MONTHLY/QUARTERLY/ANNUAL)
Last service/inspection date
Warranty expiry date or period
Required spare parts for maintenance
Maintenance access requirements (height, clearance, tools)
Commissioning status (NOT_STARTED/IN_PROGRESS/PASSED/FAILED)
Test certificate reference number
Handover/practical completion status

params.description: Comprehensive descriptive narrative — AI-assembled asset profile with embedded markup tokens for rich rendering
TAG7 Section A: Identity Header — asset name, product, manufacturer, model (styled as BOLD in tag families)
TAG7 Section B: System & Function Context — full system/function descriptions (styled as ITALIC in tag families)
TAG7 Section C: Spatial Context — room, department, grid reference
TAG7 Section D: Lifecycle & Status — status, revision, origin, maintenance
TAG7 Section E: Technical Specifications — discipline-specific MEP/BLE performance data
TAG7 Section F: Classification & Reference — Uniformat, OmniClass, keynote, cost, ISO tag

warning_thresholds.description: Panel rated capacity kW (for overload check)
Entourage scale factor out of range
Plumbing equipment pressure out of range
Pipe fitting head loss > design limit
IP rating below minimum for location

ifc_property_mapping.description: ENH-006: Maps STING parameters to IFC property sets and names for IFC export

warning_thresholds.description: Compliance check: ble stair headroom mm
Compliance check: fls travel dist m
Floor Impact Insulation Class minimum rating
Wall Sound Transmission Class minimum rating
Embodied carbon footprint limit per unit
VOC emissions limit for indoor air quality
Lift car minimum size for wheelchair access
